sourceProfile.accessNeeded: visual access to the public profile and, if available, review-level permalinks

strategicDecision: Build a verified reviews page using structured review evidence, not a screenshot dump. Screenshots can be used only as supporting visual proof after approval, with personal-data minimization and platform-policy review.

allowedNow: Define SEO/AEO metadata, schema.org strategy and compliance gate
notAllowedWithoutApproval: Republish full review texts in bulk
Expose reviewer names, avatars or other personal data
Use review content without checking platform terms and source availability

recommendedImplementation.publicPageTitle: Отзывы о консультациях и лекциях Татьяны Мунн
contentModel: Short editorial intro connecting Tatiana Moonn / Kumskova Tatiana Mikhailovna / MSU / emotional intelligence
Filtered review cards grouped by service type: consultations, lectures, emotional intelligence, adolescent psychology, relationships
Each card stores source URL, review date, rating, service category, approved excerpt or summary, proof status
CTA to Yandex Services profile and Moonn consultation/lecture pages
FAQ block for AEO: where reviews come from, how they are verified, how to book a consultation or lecture
recommendedImplementation.preferredEvidencePolicy: Use direct source links/permalinks where available. If review-level permalinks are unavailable, link to the public Yandex Services profile and store internal screenshot proof without publishing it by default.

imagePolicy.default: avoid screenshots; use text excerpts/summaries with source links
imagePolicy.altTemplate: Подтвержденный отзыв о консультации Татьяны Мунн на Яндекс Услугах

complianceRisks.description: Reviewer names, avatars, profile links and review text may contain personal data or sensitive context.
complianceRisks.rule: Minimize public reviewer identity; publish only approved excerpts or summaries and source links.

complianceRisks.description: Yandex may restrict how review content and screenshots are reused outside the platform.
complianceRisks.rule: Check Yandex review/business rules before publishing screenshots or bulk copied reviews.

complianceRisks.description: Bulk copying reviews/screenshots can be treated differently from quoting short excerpts with attribution.
complianceRisks.rule: Prefer short excerpts, summaries and links; avoid full bulk republication without approval.

complianceRisks.description: The page promotes professional services and can become advertising-like if written as guarantees.
complianceRisks.rule: Avoid unverifiable promises and keep wording factual.

complianceRisks.description: Psychological services content must avoid guaranteed treatment/medical claims.
complianceRisks.rule: Use careful service wording and keep age/health-sensitive claims reviewed.

sourcesChecked.note: Yandex review publication rules and moderation expectations.
152-FZ personal data baseline; full legal gate needed before publication.
38-FZ advertising baseline; full legal gate needed before publication.

nextSafeSteps: Get visual access to Yandex Services public reviews page.
Collect a small private pilot manifest of 10 reviews without publishing.
Classify each review by topic and service category.
Prepare a Tilda reviews page draft with placeholders and schema, but do not publish until approval.
After approval, publish a limited page with source links, summaries/excerpts and no exposed reviewer personal data by default.
Request indexing for the reviews page only after live QA and compliance gate.
blockers: Need visual access to Yandex Services reviews.
Need decision on whether reviewer names/avatars can be shown or must be minimized.
Need decision on screenshot publication policy.
Need confirmation whether source review permalinks exist.
Need Tilda page target decision: new /reviews page or an existing reviews page retrofit.
